title: Project End
description: A Mod that Upgrades the End in Minecraft
body:
Hi There! Do you Want Your End Dimension no Longer be a Barren Wasteland? well You Came to The Right Mod! Project End is Here to Update The End From a Barren Wasteland, to a More Intresting Dimension!

> 1.New Biomes!
This Mod adds 2 new Biomes! The End Wilds & The Orchestra Forest, you can find New Plants, Blocks, & Mobs!

> New Mob Class: Enderlings!
Added From MC Dungeons, These Guys will Make the End Feel Way More ALIVE! Theres Watchlings,Snarelings,Blastlings,Thumplings(Note: this is a Fanmade one), & the New Mini-Boss, The Endersent, and You Can find Enderpods In Orchestra Forests

> New Armor/Tool Set!
Lonsdaleite Can be Found in the End, To Craft Them, You Must Obtain Lonsdaleite Bits & Amethyst Shards to Craft them, Then You can Use them to Upgrade Your Diamond Armor/Tools using a Smithing Table! or Make Items like the Crystal Pearl

> New Block Variants!
This Mod Also Adds Variants to PreExisting Blocks, like Purpur Tiles,Smooth End Stone, & New Block Sets!

Hope You Enjoy This Mod! (Note: New Features Will Come Soon)
